Title: The Running Man

Date Published: 1987-11-13

Directors: Paul Michael Glaser
Creators: Stephen King / Steven E. de Souza

Introduction
    In a dystopian America, a falsely convicted policeman gets his shot at freedom when he must forcibly participate in a TV game show where convicts, runners, must battle killers for their freedom.

Filming locations: Sony Pictures Plaza, 10000 Washington Blvd, Culver City, California, USA
